title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Surrogacy (Regulation) Act, 2021. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 25th January, 2021, vide notification No. S.O. 292(E), dated 20th January, 2021, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (ii).
